## edu-cli class unbind-syllabus

Unbind the syllabus from a teaching class (解除教学班的syllabus绑定)

```
edu-cli class unbind-syllabus [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint   Class ID (required)
  -h, --help            help for unbind-syllabus
```
